raw_consumer_statement: I AM FILING A COMPLAINT TO HOME DEPOT CREDIT CARD, BECAUSE I PREVIOUSLY FILED A FRAUD DISPUTE SINCE SOMEONE ELSE STOLE MY CREDIT CARD AND MADE MULTIPLE FRAUDULENT PURCHASES.
